title: sphaerocionium obtusum
intro: Sphaerocionium obtusum, also known as the cushion star or cushion liverwort, is a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that grows in dense, rounded masses on rocks and trees. Traditionally, Sphaerocionium obtusum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as being used to treat conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Sphaerocionium obtusum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
